title: ROT47 Cipher Encoder/Decoder
description: ROT47 is a simple substitution cipher that shifts each printable ASCII character 47 places, effectively scrambling text while preserving character readability. Because the alphabet of 94 printable ASCII characters is rotated by half its size (47), a double rotation always cancels itself out. ROT47 is a lightweight text obfuscation method.
